heading: Omitted
label: 983d Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for governance of the tribe by an Interim Council until a constitution would be adopted and tribal officials would be elected, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 101–484, § 6104 Stat. 1168Oct. 31, 1990
